answers.description: A framework for building a freelance company staffed by orchestrated AI agent teams
answers.problem: Freelance/agency work (design, proposals, marketing) is manual and hard to run repeatably at quality
answers.users: Solo operators / founders running an AI-augmented freelance or agency business
goals: Repeatable, high-quality agent pipelines from intake to delivery
Blackboard + checkpoint discipline so runs are resumable and human-gated
principles: Portability across harnesses (one source of truth)
answers.substrate: Markdown workflows + JSON state; Python tooling/scripts expected soon
answers.harnesses: Both Claude Code and Cursor, portable from one source of truth
answers.data: HubSpot CRM (marketing SOR); blackboard markdown + state.json for artifacts
answers.infra: Locally inside the AI harness against a git repo
answers.tdd: Flexible — tests recommended for complex logic; N/A for pure markdown
answers.checkpoints: At defined pipeline gates — qualify, board decision, deliver/package
answers.existing_configs: Generate fresh guide standardized on ruff + black + type hints
